# Standing Firm in the Face of Adversity
## Scripture
"So we do not lose heart. Though our outer self is wasting away, our inner self is being renewed day by day." – 2 Corinthians 4:16

## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we face battles every day. The enemy of our soul is relentless in his pursuit of destroying our faith and weakening our resolve. But we are not to lose heart. Instead, we are to look to the Lord and trust in His power to renew us day by day. This means that even when our outer self is worn down by trials and hardships, our inner self is being strengthened and refreshed.

As we walk through the fire, our character is being refined and purified, making us more like Christ. So, let us not be discouraged by the struggles we face, but rather, let us see them as opportunities to grow and draw closer to the Lord. He is our rock, our refuge, and our strength.

## Daily Challenge
"Stand for 5 minutes in a prayer stance, asking the Lord to strengthen your inner self and renew your spirit."
